title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 49.410 - Plan of building to be submitted
text:
49.410.  Plan of building to be submitted. — When the ground for erecting any public building shall be designated, as aforesaid, the superintendent shall prepare and submit to the county commission a plan of the building to be erected, the dimensions thereof, and the materials of which it is to be composed, with an estimate of the probable cost thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 13723, A.L. 1983 S.B. 219) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12064; 1919 § 9464; 1909 § 3685 
Effective 1-01-85
